title: hieracium helveticum
intro: Hieracium helveticum, also known as the Alpine Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Alpine Hawkweed is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have health benefits such as antioxidant, anti-cancer, and cardiovascular-protective properties. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
